title: Notification preferences belong to a separate user-settings feature
body: This feature's spec defines per-channel notification toggles; that surface is owned by user-settings. Either move the toggles or document the cross-feature boundary explicitly.

title: Compliance reviewer not named for notification opt-in
body: Email opt-in flow has CAN-SPAM and CASL implications; the spec does not name a compliance approver and does not record sign-off on the opt-in copy.
